description: Assign or get information about shell constitutive models. This command allows assignment of a constitutive model to a specified shell-type element, querying properties and states of constitutive models, and assigning and querying the integration scheme for plastic elements.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 7.0 contents command index.

keywords.name: assign
keywords.description: Assign the specified constitutive model to all liner elements in the range. If a constitutive model has already been assigned, the existing one is replaced with the new one. If an elastic or plastic model is replaced by an elastic one, the nodal forces acting on the element remain the same. If a plastic model is replaced by another plastic model, both the integration scheme and the stress at each integration point are preserved. Replacing an elastic model with a plastic model is not yet implemented. Properties of the newly assigned constitutive model take their default values and should be set with the structure liner property command. The integration scheme for plastic models is set with the structure liner cmodel plastic-integration command.

keywords.name: assign-anisotropic
keywords.description: assign the transversely-anisotropic elastic model (see the Anisotropic model description).

keywords.name: assign-elastic
keywords.description: assign the isotropic elastic model (see the Elastic Model description).

keywords.name: assign-mohr-coulomb
keywords.description: assign the Mohr-Coulomb elasto-plasticity model (see the Mohr-Coulomb model description).

keywords.name: assign-orthotropic
keywords.description: assign the orthotropic elastic model (see the Orthotropic model description).

keywords.name: assign-strain-softening
keywords.description: assign the strain-softening/hardening elasto-plasticity model (see the Strain-Softening model description).

keywords.name: assign-von-mises
keywords.description: assign the Von-Mises elasto-plasticity model (see the Von-Mises model description).

keywords.name: list
keywords.description: List information about liner constitutive models. Sub-keywords are names, plastic-integration, properties, and states.

keywords.name: list-names
keywords.description: Output available liner constitutive model keywords and full names. Output is restricted to the model named s if supplied.

keywords.name: list-plastic-integration
keywords.description: Output the plastic-integration data for elements in the range. Data for all integration points is listed unless integration-point <ind> is specified, in which case only the data for integration point ind is listed.

keywords.name: list-properties
keywords.description: Output the property list for each liner constitutive model. Output is restricted to the model named s if supplied.

keywords.name: list-states
keywords.description: Output the state flags for each liner constitutive model. Output is restricted to the model named s if supplied.

keywords.name: plastic-integration
keywords.description: Assign the integration scheme for plastic liner elements: nplane is the number of integration points in the element plane, nthickness is the number of integration points through the thickness. Affects only elements with a plastic constitutive model assigned. The integration scheme cannot be modified after cycling has occurred. When the integration scheme is set, the constitutive-model properties are reset to their defaults, so model properties should be set AFTER setting the integration scheme.
